block_03: We do our best to make our affiliates' user experience nice and easy. Great news — your IQ Option Affiliate cabinet is now available in [Vietnamese/Indonesian/Thai]!
block_04: To switch the interface to your language, click on the icon in the upper left corner and select the desired language from the list.
block_05: * Help us get better! If you noticed a mistake, we’d appreciate it if you inform your manager and suggest more appropriate wording.
